0.title: NetworkRxDropped (by Broker ID)

1.title: NetworkRxDropped Sum (by Broker ID)
1.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries network_rx_dropped_sum_by_broker_id = avg(cloud.aws.kafka.network_rx_dropped_sum_by_broker_id), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| sort arrayAvg(network_rx_dropped_sum_by_broker_id) desc
| limit 20
